menu_description: Hey everyone! Click the respective button at the bottom of this post to add (or remove) a role. Here's an overview of the available roles:

ip.title: ⛏️ Minecraft Server
ip.description:
**`mc.sn4k.org`**

Running the latest Paper MC update. Every Minecraft version is supported, so just connect with whatever you're on!

roles.description: If you want to be pinged when we post an announcement
If you want to be pinged when we post new free goodies
If you want access to fortnite channels
If you want access to roblox channels
